input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for St. Michael's Hospital. There are 30 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "respiratory", "count": 3, "message": "3 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "cardiac", "count": 3, "message": "3 cardiac patients incoming", "protocol": "Pre-alert cath lab \u2014 multiple cardiac presentations"}, {"category": "pain", "count": 8, "message": "8 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "neuro", "count": 3, "message": "3 neuro patients incoming", "protocol": "Stroke code readiness \u2014 cluster of neuro presentations"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 4, "message": "4 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "mental", "count": 5, "message": "5 mental patients incoming", "protocol": "Crisis team activation \u2014 psychiatric surge"}, {"category": "general", "count": 3, "message": "3 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 100, "current_utilization": 55, "recommendation": "Projected full in ~100 min. Monitor closely. Prepare contingency."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Toronto General Hospital", "facility_id": "toronto-general", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Toronto General Hospital (50% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "Mount Sinai Hospital", "facility_id": "mount-sinai", "current_utilization": 50, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to Mount Sinai Hospital (50% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Charge nurse, we have 30 incoming patients. Immediately activate isolation protocols for 3 respiratory patients, pre-alert the cath lab for 3 cardiac patients, prepare for stroke code readiness for 3 neuro patients, and activate the crisis team for 5 mental health patients. With current utilization at 55% and projected capacity reached in 100 minutes, consider diverting CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, Toronto General, or Mount Sinai, all at 50% capacity, to manage the incoming load and maintain patient safety.
